title: Cast steel parts for hydroelectric power generation
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain cast steel parts for hydroelectric power generation capable of maintaining the high toughness without carrying out annealing after welding by adding specified amounts of Ni and Mo to a 13Cr steel.
CONSTITUTION: Parts for a hydroelectric power generator such as the runner and guide vane of a water turbine are made of a 13Cr-5Ni steel consisting of, by weight <0.06% C, 0.5% Si, <1% Mn, 12W14% Cr, 4W6% Ni, 0.2W0.5% Mo and the balance Fe. The resulting parts can maintain the high toughness without carrying out annealing after welding.
